artPrompt: A persuasive human petitioner leaning in close to an unseen undecided voter, one hand gently turning a spinning silver coin in the warm air, the other offering a covered casserole dish, a knowing patient smile on his face. A single lamp gilds his cheek and the glinting coin while the rest of the porch sinks into deep brooding shadow. Rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Undecided-Voter Whisperer
text:
Whenever a player flips a coin or rolls a die for any reason (including the rival mayor's many, many coins), you may create a 1/1 green and white Voter creature token. Do this no more than once each turn.
{T}: You decide the outcome of the next coin flip you're allowed to influence this turn — heads, naturally.
flavorText: "I see you're still deciding. Let me walk you through it. There's casserole involved."

extras.interaction: reacts to coins/dice from rival deck
